name: Western Beans and Rice (Vegan)
recipeIngredient: 1/4 tsp Hot pepper sauce, to 1/2 t.
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the chopped onions and sliced celery to the skillet. Cook until the vegetables are tender, stirring occasionally.
3. Stir in the canned tomato sauce, water, salt, and hot pepper sauce. Mix well.
4. Add the cooked pinto beans and stir to combine with the sauce mixture.
5. Heat the ingredients through for a few minutes until everything is evenly heated.
6. Serve over the hot brown rice.
Note: Any type of beans may be used in this recipe.
